item.title: 16th Sunday of Pentecost, In summary, "Receive not the grace of God in vain", 2008-10-05

item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :16th Sunday of Pentecost. In summary, "Receive not the grace of God in vain", 2008-10-05

item.title: 16th Sunday of Pentecost, Parable Of The Talents, Receive Not The Grace Of God In Vain, 2010-09-12
item.description: :16th Sunday of Pentecost. Both the epistle and the Gospel story of the parable of the talents express the same basic idea: we must, as the Epistle puts it "receive not the grace of God in vain." The epistle discusses in great detail how we can "trade" with this grace (called talents in the parable).
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :16th Sunday of Pentecost. Both the epistle and the Gospel story of the parable of the talents express the same basic idea: we must, as the Epistle puts it "receive not the grace of God in vain." The epistle discusses in great detail how we can "trade" with this grace (called talents in the parable).
